issues.detail: Your page title tag is missing. This appears in search results and browser tabs.
issues.label: Missing page title
issues.check: Open the page. Look at the browser tab text. If it says the URL or 'Home' instead of your business name, it is missing.
issues.siteHint: Google may show your URL instead of a proper title in search results.

issues.detail: Meta descriptions appear below your link in Google. Without one, Google picks random text.
issues.label: Missing meta description
issues.check: Google your site name. See what text appears under the link. If it is gibberish or missing, meta description is absent.
issues.siteHint: You lose control over how your site appears in search results.

issues.detail: Inline style tags cannot be cached. Moving to external CSS speeds up repeat visits.
issues.label: 21 inline style blocks
issues.check: View page source. Count the style tags. More than 3-4 is unwieldy.
issues.siteHint: Slower repeat visits, harder code maintenance.

issues.detail: Consider consolidating or deferring non-critical scripts.
issues.label: 19 external scripts
issues.check: Same check - DevTools Network tab, filter by JS.

issues.detail: Images that fail to load show blank boxes or broken icons.
issues.label: 31 broken image(s)
issues.check: Scroll through the page. Do you see any broken image icons?
issues.siteHint: Broken images look unprofessional. Each one should load properly.

issues.detail: Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).
issues.label: Placeholder/low-quality images detected
issues.check: Do any images look like grey boxes or low-res blurs where real images should be?
issues.siteHint: Replace placeholder images with actual photography or graphics.

issues.detail: The navbar links to a contact page, but none of the common paths (/contact, /contact-us) resolved.
issues.label: Contact info may be behind a custom URL
issues.check: Click the Contact link in the navigation to verify it works.
issues.siteHint: Unusual contact page URLs can confuse visitors and search engines.

issues.detail: SSL cert renews on Jun 30 16:08:03 2026 GMT. Mark your calendar.
issues.label: SSL certificate expires in 59 days
issues.check: Check the lock icon in the address bar.
issues.siteHint: Just a reminder ÔÇö easy to forget until it is too late.

issues.detail: HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.
issues.label: Missing HSTS header
issues.check: Open DevTools ÔåÆ Network ÔåÆ click the first request ÔåÆ look for "strict-transport-security".
issues.siteHint: HSTS is a simple config that hardens your site against protocol downgrade attacks.

issues.detail: CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.
issues.label: Missing Content Security Policy
issues.check: Check DevTools Console for CSP-related warnings.
issues.siteHint: A basic CSP blocks most common script injection attacks.

issues.detail: The site runs on Shopify. This limits SEO flexibility, page speed control, and custom features.
issues.label: Using Shopify (DIY builder)
issues.check: View page source and search for the platform.
issues.siteHint: Businesses often outgrow Shopify and need a custom site to stand out.
